tasks.description: Mustache Template Rendering - Add Mustache dependency, create internal/template/renderer.go, update ResolveBody() in pkg/airesource/fragment.go, add tests for variable substitution, conditionals, array iteration, missing variables, and template syntax errors
comments: Blocks core functionality - fragment resolution cannot render templates
Estimated effort: 2-3 hours
Spec: specs/fragment-resolution.md

Completed: Mustache already integrated, added comprehensive tests (missing variables, conditional false, empty array iteration, object iteration, single item array, template syntax errors), created internal/template/renderer.go, refactored fragment.go to use internal package. All tests pass.

tasks.description: Fragment Input Validation via JSON Schema - Refactor ValidateInputs() to use BuildSchemaFromInputs() and internal/schema/validator.go, remove manual validateType() function, update error handling to convert JSON Schema errors to InputError format, update tests
comments: Spec compliance - implementation uses manual type checking instead of JSON Schema
Estimated effort: 2-3 hours
Spec: specs/fragment-input-validation.md

Completed: Added ValidateAgainstSchema() to internal/schema/validator.go, refactored ValidateInputs() to use JSON Schema validation, removed manual validateType/validateInputTypes/getTypeName functions, added convertSchemaErrorToInputError() to parse JSON Schema errors into InputError format. All tests pass.

tasks.description: Conformance Test Suite Structure - Add git submodule for spec repository (if exists), update conformance_test.go to discover fixtures from testdata/spec/examples/, run valid/invalid examples, generate conformance report, document in README.md
comments: Spec compliance - no official test fixtures from spec repository
Estimated effort: 1-2 hours
Spec: specs/conformance-testing.md
Note: If spec repository doesn't exist yet, defer and document in AUDIT.md

Completed: Spec repository does not exist yet. Documented in AUDIT.md. Updated conformance_test.go to support future spec fixture discovery (checks testdata/spec/examples/ first, falls back to local fixtures). Added conformance testing section to README.md. All tests pass.

tasks.description: LoadOptions Completeness - Add MaxArraySize (default: 10000), MaxNestingDepth (default: 100), Timeout (default: 30s) to pkg/airesource/options.go, add functional options, implement enforcement in loader.go, add tests for limit violations
comments: Safety & robustness - missing safety limits for arrays, nesting depth, and timeouts
Estimated effort: 2-3 hours
Spec: specs/resource-loading.md

Completed: Added timeout enforcement with context.WithTimeout, added validateLimits() function to check MaxArraySize and MaxNestingDepth recursively, created loader_test.go with tests for all limit violations (file size, array size, nesting depth, timeout, multi-document). All tests pass.
